description: Deed of indebtedness. Location: Fustat. Dated: 5 Iyyar 1603 Seleucid, which is 1292 CE, under the authority of David I Maimonides. Legal document concerning a loan of 400 dirhams from the perfumer Abū l-Faḍl b. Abū l-Ḥasan the doctor to Abū l-Faḍl Ibn al-Akram the banker ha-Levi (known as Ibn Nuʿmān). No signatures. On verso is a drawing of a star or flower. (Information in part from CUDL.)
description_he: שטר חוב, פוסטאט, 1292, בסמכות דוד מיימוניד הראשון. הלוואת 400 דירהם מהבסמי לבנקאי אבן נועמאן.
